_comment: Which reporting periods are currently 'active' (i.e. companies are still filing for them). Only financial-statement filings matching one of these entries trigger a Telegram notification. data/processed/ is still updated for every filing regardless, so historical accuracy is preserved. Update this file when the SEC filing window rolls over.

active_filings.note: Q1/2569 filings open Apr 2026 → deadline mid-May 2026
